10.08.2021 Online ERASMUS+ 2021 Written Exam Important Information

Click

for ERASMUS+ Written Exam Announcement

Foreign Languages Unit English Preparatory Program Online ERASMUS+ 2021 Written Exam Procedures and Principles

Dear Students,

ERASMUS+ 2021 Written Exam will be held online on Tuesday, August 10, 2021 with remote supervision. The exam consists of two parts, written and speaking, our students are required to attend both exams (Written Exam and Speaking Exam).

: 10 August 2021 at 11:00 – 12.35

: 11 August 2021 at 09:00 – 14.50

The Written Exam will be available at

douonlineydb.dogus.edu.tr

at 11:00 am. Students are required to approve the PDP LAW INFORMATION and CONSENT TEXTS on the system before starting the exam. All students are required to be present in their assigned Microsoft Teams classes

by 10:30

and turn on their camera and microphone. The camera will be on throughout the entire exam, but the microphone will only be turned on if needed. It is important for students to have a current photo and valid identity document (student identity card, TR identity document, passport, driver's license) at the exam. Students who do not have a valid identity document will not be able to participate in the exam.

Students who do not want to attend the exam with a camera and microphone should

inform their exam preferences

via e-mail to

[email protected]

from their student e-mail address

by Friday, August 06, 17.00

. These students will be able to participate in the exam in B1-04 PC LAB in the Dudullu campus of our University, without a camera and microphone, invigilated by an instructor.

The form of participation in the exam is left to the choice of our students. Students who do not make a written application via e-mail that they want to take the exam at the Dudullu campus of our University within the time given will be assumed to be attending the exam from outside the campus, provided that they turn on "camera and microphone".

*Information about the Speaking Exam and Speaking Appointment lists will be announced separately on our website.
